steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The passage notes that Tang’s ambitions “weren’t very lofty” when he started the site, but later says his site “has become an essential resource.” This sets up a contrast between modest beginnings and significant impact.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
Nevertheless, signals a contrast, matching the shift from low ambition to essential resource.
The other three either imply cause-effect, addition, or sequence, none of which capture that contrast.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
